reference: I suffer from lung distress three to four times a day and take pain pills and Xanax to relieve discomfort. However, it gets worse. It is almost impossible to get rid of my thick mucus. I take two saline treatments a day and two vest treatments a day. It helps sometimes, but more often it does not. I take azithromycin for fourteen days at the beginning of the month and ciprofloxacin the following month alternately. Your suggestions would be appreciated.
text: I suffer from lung distress 3 to 4 times a day, and take pain pills and Xanax to relieve discomfort. However, it gets worse; it is almost impossible to get rid of my thick mucus. I take 2 saline treatments a day and 2 vest treatments a day. It helps sometimes, but more often it does not. I take azithromycin for 14 days at the beginning of the month, and ciprofloxacin the following month, alternately. Your suggestions would be appreciated.
